title: Anthropic rejects Pentagon’s ‘final offer’ for military use of its AI
description: CEO Dario Amodei said start-up ‘cannot in good conscience’ agree to US government’s terms
content: CEO Dario Amodei said start-up ‘cannot in good conscience’ agree to US government’s terms
